title: Inconsistent result for OVER() when used in stored procedure over InnoDB table
poc: INSERT INTO tbTestBad2 SELECT 1 AS id;
key_bug_features: Inconsistent results from window function in InnoDB stored procedure
bug_features_seed: CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE tbTestBad2 (id INT, value DECIMAL(10, 2), created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO tbTestBad2 (id, value) VALUES (1, NULL), (2, 10.50), (3, 20.00);
CREATE PROCEDURE IF NOT EXISTS spTestBad() BEGIN SELECT id, (SUM(value) OVER()) AS total_value FROM tbTestBad2;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_rows, AVG(value) AS average_value FROM tbTestBad2 WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
